zh.Acton Hall, Bures, Suffolk, England, Kin: 英國英格蘭素福爾可阿克頓
zh.lifeSummary: Alice Smythe是Smythe和Smythe的女兒，於1480年1月1日出生在英國艾可。她於大約1496年與Andrew Bures在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1520年3月18日在英國英格蘭艾可享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Smythe是Smythe和Smythe的女儿，于1480年1月1日出生在英国艾可。她于大约1496年与Andrew Bures在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1520年3月18日在英国英格兰艾可享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Smythe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Smith
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Smythe was born on 1 January 1480, in Essex, England as the daughter of Smythe and Smythe. She married Andrew Bures about 1496, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 18 March 1520, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Smythe est née le 1 janvier 1480, à Essex, Angleterre, fille de Smythe et Smythe. Elle a épousé Andrew Bures environ 1496, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 mars 1520, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Alice Smythe wurde am 1. Januar 1480 in Essex, England, als Tochter von Smythe und Smythe geboren. Sie hat um 1496 in Essex, England Andrew Bures geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. März 1520 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Alice Smythe è nata il il 1 gennaio 1480 nel Essex, England come figlia di Smythe e Smythe. Lei sposato Andrew Bures circa 1496, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 marzo 1520, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Smytheは1480年1月1日にイギリスエセックスでSmytheとSmytheの娘として生まれた。約1496年にイギリスエセックスでAndrew Buresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1520年3月18日にイギリスイギリスエセックスで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Smythe(은)는 1480년 1월 1일 영국 에세스에서 Smythe(와)과 Smythe의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1496년 영국 에세스에서 Andrew Bures(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 3월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 January 1480–18 March 1520: 1 de janeiro de 1480–18 de março de 1520
pt.lifeSummary: Alice Smythe nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1480, em Essex, Inglaterra filha de Smythe e Smythe. Ela casou-se com Andrew Bures aproximadamente 1496, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de março de 1520, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Smythe родилась 1 января 1480 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. Её родителей звали Smythe и Smythe. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew Bures около 1496 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 марта 1520 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.1 January 1480–18 March 1520: 1 de enero de 1480–18 de marzo de 1520
es.lifeSummary: Alice Smythe nació el 1 de enero de 1480, en Essex, Inglaterra como hija de Smythe y Smythe. Se casó con Andrew Bures aproximadamente 1496, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1520, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
